response: Please contact your IT admin to add you back to the IdP group associated with your role. If you need to force an immediate sync, you can click 'SCIM sync' in the Groups section.
justification: According to Doc 1, removing a member from the IdP group revokes their access. To restore access, they should be added back to the group. Doc 1 also mentions that clicking 'SCIM sync' can force an immediate sync rather than waiting for the next scheduled sync.

response: The inactivity time for candidates and interviewers is currently set to automatically push the candidate back to the lobby when all interviewers leave the interview. This is to prevent interviewers or recruiters from entering the interview while it is already in progress.
justification: According to Doc 2, the candidate is automatically pushed back to the lobby when all interviewers leave the interview. There is no mention of specific inactivity times for candidates and interviewers.

response: To pause your subscription, please go to the Billing page and click the Cancel Subscription button. Then, in the popup, select Extend Pause, choose the new pause duration, and click Confirm Extension.
